path:
cd /workspaces/chateaudelesigny
for u in fr/ en/ fr/le-domaine/ fr/contact/ fr/tournages/ en/mariages/ fr/mentions-legales/; do
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "http://localhost:4321/$u")
  echo "  $code  /$u"
done

curl -fsSL "https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/api.php?action=query&list=search&srsearch=Leonora%20Galigai&srnamespace=6&format=json&srlimit=20" 2>/dev/null | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || echo "FAILED - no network or curl"

cd /workspaces/chateaudelesigny
TMP=/tmp/claude-1000/-workspaces-chateaudelesigny/debe6c98-7072-4ece-8d15-fb4d7f7cc8c4/scratchpad
node -e "const s=require('sharp');s('src/assets/gallery/plan-floorplan.jpg').resize(500).jpeg().toFile('$TMP/plan.jpg').then(m=>console.log('plan',m.width+'x'+m.height));" 2>&1
echo "=== OSM: what does OpenStreetMap know about Château de Lésigny? ==="
curl -sL -A "chateau-site-research" "https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search?q=Ch%C3%A2teau+de+L%C3%A9signy%2C+L%C3%A9signy%2C+77150&format=json&polygon_geojson=1&limit=3" 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(x.get('osm_type'),x.get('osm_id'),'|',x.get('display_name','')[:80],'|',x.get('class'),x.get('type'),'| geojson:',x.get('geojson',{}).get('type')) for x in d]" 2>&1 | head
